nodes.name: Runtime Layer Separation and Essential Boundary Strokes

gates.independent_audit: Antigravity verification of layer-separation rendering pipeline
gates.owner_qa: Manual check of stroke widths, opacity offsets, and fallback rendering

nodes.name: Icon and Grid Asset Registry Integration

gates.independent_audit: Antigravity validation of icon namespacing and fallback IDs
gates.owner_qa: Verification of no UI Command Icons mixed in the plan library

nodes.name: Batch 1: C0.4F-B Editing, History and Minimal Inspector Ingestion

gates.independent_audit: Verify single-step undo history for all slider and text commits
gates.owner_qa: Double-click rename, Escape cancellation, and local style overrides

nodes.name: Batch 2: Area Editing, Table/Canvas Sync, and Reliable File Intake

gates.independent_audit: Verify no infinite loops during canvas drag and table update cycles
gates.owner_qa: CSV upload mapping preview, XLS worksheet choice, and append/replace modes

nodes.name: Batch 3: Floor System, Derived Statistics, and Compact Dashboard

gates.independent_audit: Verify stats exclude hidden floor spaces; monitor recomputation lag
gates.owner_qa: Floor levels ordering, show/hide floor visibility, and mix distributions

nodes.name: Batch 4: Essential Connections, Export Parity, and Scene Hardening

gates.independent_audit: Verify offscreen capture excludes active selection borders and command menus
gates.owner_qa: Vector SVG export verification, A3 landscape PDF metadata footer, and ZIP presentation package

edges.dependency_reason: Inspector requires layer targets (Cell, Boundary, Core) to exist in data contracts
Inspector Symbol Tab requires the canonical icon catalog for lookup queries
Table editor must sync values with the newly established Inspector fields
Floor selectors require a stabilized single-level edit cycle to build multi-level queries
Relationship rendering between cells depends on a stabilized multi-floor layout grid
